items.title: Creating Group Rules with AI: Human-AI Collaboration in WhatsApp Moderation
items.metaphor: A large community noticeboard holding one big scroll of rules, being written simultaneously by a human hand holding a pencil from the left and a friendly robot hand holding a pencil from the right, while a small crowd of round chat-bubble characters watches attentively from below like villagers at a town meeting.

items.title: Large-Scale Multimodal Content Analysis and Annotation with Vision-Language Models
items.metaphor: A tangled flood of mixed media — photographs, film strips, posters, memes and speech bubbles — pouring into a large triangular glass prism from the left, and emerging on the right as neat, orderly parallel sorted ribbons, like chaos refracted into order.

items.title: Quantifying the Illicit Ecosystem of Betting Apps in India
items.metaphor: A giant smartphone drawn as a casino slot machine, its three reels showing a cricket ball, a coin and a pair of dice, with a fishing line and hook dangling a shiny coin above it as bait, while a stream of small coins drains out of the bottom of the phone into a dark hole.

items.title: Evaluating Community-Based and Peer Fact-Checking on WhatsApp
items.metaphor: Two neighbors leaning over a garden fence made of chat bubbles, one passing a crumpled rumor note to the other, who inspects it through a large magnifying glass that reveals a bold checkmark inside the note, warm and friendly neighborhood scene.

items.title: Disagreement Is Disappearing on U.S. Cable Debate Shows
items.metaphor: Two vintage television sets facing each other like boxers in a ring, each screen showing a talking head in profile, with a once-mighty lightning bolt between them now dissolving into faint dots and confetti, the spark of debate literally fading away.

items.title: Personal Experience and Public Support for Internet Shutdowns in Rural India
items.metaphor: A rural Indian landscape at dusk where a giant wifi symbol sets on the horizon like the sun, a cleanly cut telephone cable in the foreground sprouts a small flower from its cut end, and a family sits together under a large banyan tree playing a board game by lantern light.

items.title: Structural Dynamics of Harmful Content Dissemination on WhatsApp
items.metaphor: A branching cascade diagram drawn as ink dropped into water: from a single phone at the top, one dark ink drop splits and spreads downward through many layers of round chat bubbles, reaching far deeper and wider than a small tidy light-colored drop cascading beside it.
